seo.title: Speaking | Beth Motley, MD
seo.description: Book Dr. Motley for your next event. Engaging, evidence-based presentations on lifestyle medicine, diabetes reversal, workplace wellness, and more.

hero.headline: Bring Lifestyle Medicine to Your Audience
hero.subheadline: Engaging, evidence-based presentations that translate science into practical, actionable takeaways.

keynoteHighlight.imageAlt: Dr. Motley presenting at the podium at the American College of Lifestyle Medicine 2019 conference
keynoteHighlight.title: ACLM National Conference 2019
keynoteHighlight.talkTitle: How Providers Can Integrate Lifestyle Medicine into Their Existing Practice
keynoteHighlight.description: A standing-ovation keynote on practical tools for bringing lifestyle medicine into any clinical setting, without building a separate practice from scratch.

topics.title: Speaking Topics
topics.subtitle: Each presentation is grounded in peer-reviewed evidence and tailored to your audience
items: Provider Tools for Implementing Lifestyle Medicine in Clinical Practice
Lifestyle Medicine: Adding Years to Life and Life to Years
Prescribing Plants: The Role of Plant-Based Nutrition in Cardiovascular Disease
The Plant-Based Protocol for Reversing Type 2 Diabetes
Preventing and Reversing Chronic Disease with Lifestyle Medicine: Translating the Evidence into Practical Application in the Clinic
How to Raise an Adult: Promoting Healthful Eating for the Whole Family
The Science of Sustainable Change: Rewiring Habits, Food, and Environment

audiences.title: Audiences
audiences.subtitle: Dr. Motley speaks to a wide range of groups and formats

testimonials.title: What Attendees Are Saying
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from the ACLM 2019 National Conference keynote and other events

items.quote: This was hands down the most useful presentation I attended. Thank you for this one!
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: Excellent presentation. Practical, energetic, inspiring. Very impressive, especially for a young physician.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: The most engaging, practical presentation of the entire conference. So much information packed into this presentation! Specific and targeted to patient contact. Kudos.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: So great to hear from a family doctor in solo practice utilizing resources from around her, rather than hearing from a team-based lifestyle medicine practice. This was great to get us headed in the right direction.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: Fantastic! So helpful. The Google Drive may be the most helpful tool I take away from the conference. Very practical.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: She is an amazing presenter. Very informative and useful. Will implement in my practice.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: Excellent engaging speaker who offered real advice on how to incorporate LM into practice. Practical advice on coding. Love that she has given us her own resources for free! Impressed that she has mastered this area so early in her career.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: This was fantastic and very helpful. I hope to incorporate info from this session into my practice as a future NP.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: Absolutely by far my favorite session. She needs to come to every conference, allow more time!
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee

items.quote: Best speaker of the conference. What is your secret to unlimited energy? You just radiate energy.
items.name: ACLM 2019 Attendee
